languages.text: "Сан генетора дает благословение на установку, освящение и обслуживание аугментов, что позволяет приводить слабые тела Человечества к максимальной эффективности, угодной Омниссии".

traits.locale_text: "Высококвалифицированная медицинская единица, производящая замену и обслуживание священных имплантов а также приводящая слабые тела Человечества к механическому совершенству".

languages.text: "Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: "Сан генетора дает благословение на установку, освящение и обслуживание аугментов, что позволяет приводить слабые тела Человечества к максимальной эффективности, угодной Омниссии".

traits.locale_text: "Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."

"Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."

"Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to the mechanical perfection pleasing to the Omnissiah."

"Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."

"Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."

languages.text: 「ジェネーターの称号を持つ者は、増幅器の設置、聖別、維持に祝福を与える。これにより、人類の弱き肉体は、オムニシアの好む機械的な完成度へと近づいていく」
languages.original_text: "Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to the mechanical perfection pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: 「ジェネーターの称号を持つ者は、増幅器の設置、聖別、維持に祝福を与える。これにより、人類の弱き肉体は、オムニシアの好む機械的な完成度へと近づいていく。」

languages.text: "Genetör mevkisinde olanlar; ogmentlerin kurulumunu, takdis edilmesini ve bakımını kutsayarak İnsanlığın zayıf bedenlerini Hermesih'i memnun eden maksimum verimliliğe yaklaştırır."
languages.original_text: "Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Genetör mevkisinde olanlar; ogmentlerin kurulumunu, takdis edilmesini ve bakımını kutsayarak İnsanlığın zayıf bedenlerini Hermesih'i memnun eden maksimum verimliliğe yaklaştırır."

languages.text: «Los poseedores del rango de genetor conceden bendiciones a la instalación, consagración y mantenimiento de los aumentos, acercando así los endebles cuerpos de la Humanidad a la eficacia máxima que complace al Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: "Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: «Los poseedores del rango de genetor conceden bendiciones a la instalación, consagración y mantenimiento de los aumentos, acercando así los endebles cuerpos de la Humanidad a la eficacia máxima que complace al Omnissiah».

languages.text: “拥有基因士头衔者，以植入物的安装、圣化与维护降下赐福，从而引领人类脆弱的血肉迈向令欧姆尼赛亚愉悦的至高效率。”
languages.original_text: "Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: “拥有基因士头衔者，以植入物的安装、圣化与维护降下赐福，从而引领人类脆弱的血肉迈向令欧姆尼赛亚愉悦的至高效率。”

languages.text: « Ceux qui occupent le poste de genetor confèrent des bénédictions à l'installation, la consécration et la maintenance des augmentations, pour aider le corps faillible des humains à se rapprocher de l'efficacité optimale qui sied à l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: "Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: « Ceux qui occupent le poste de genetor confèrent des bénédictions à l'installation, la consécration et la maintenance des augmentations, pour aider le corps faillible des humains à se rapprocher de l'efficacité optimale qui sied à l'Omnimessie. »

languages.text: "Wer den Rang des Genetors trägt, segnet die Installation, Weihe und Wartung der Augmentationen und bringt damit die schwachen Körper der Menschen der maximalen Effizienz näher, die den Omnissiah erfreut."
languages.original_text: "Those bearing the rank of Genetor bestow blessings on the installation, consecration, and maintenance of the augments, thus drawing the feeble bodies of Humanity closer to maximum efficiency pleasing to the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Wer den Rang des Genetors trägt, segnet die Installation, Weihe und Wartung der Augmentationen und bringt damit die schwachen Körper der Menschen der maximalen Effizienz näher, die den Omnissiah erfreut."
